channel.title: Drafts on kinow
channel.description: Recent content in Drafts on kinow

item.description:
I am following the documentation of FALL3D. It contains a section specifically made for installing FALL3D on EuroHPC. It also mentions BSC MareNostrum5 and CSC LUMI, two platforms I have access to right now.

https://fall3d-suite.gitlab.io/fall3d/chapters/installationHPC.html

BSC MareNostrum 5

I chose to compile the version without GPU support, and only MPI, no OpenACC. Looking at the list of modules listed in their documentation for MareNostrum, I believe these are the modules that I have to load:
